title: An Act to Support Healthy Meal Programs in Maine Schools by Allowing the School Revolving Renovation Fund to Make Loans to Repair and Renovate School Kitchens and Cafeterias
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 6, 2025
last_house_action: 3/25/2025 - Committee on Education and Cultural Affairs suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/6/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
